title: Photon reimagined
description: vanilla feel with insane visuals, expandet farming, nicer exploration and more things you can do. (works very well on a small community server)
body:
**Welcome to Photon reimagined**

This modpack aims to have more things that build on midgame and endgame:
For **midgame** there are mods like _smallships_, _Immersive Aircraft_, _Dungeons and Taverns_ and _Farmers Delight_.
But good **endgame** mods are also included. For example _Enderite Mod_, _Create_ (plus addons), _Mobheads_ (great for collecting) and some other additions.
**Terrain generation** isnt unchanged either. The mods in this pack are _Tectonic_, _Terralith_, _stony cliffs are cool_, _Better Nether*_ and _Better End*_.

So why even bother with this modpack?
This modpack gives you the freedom to choose what you want to do, this is possible through the diversity of mods while nothing being invasive. 

In the future i will add links so problems and questions can be submitted.

**Important:** if you want shaders to work properly with create you need to download _colorweel_ and _colorweel patcher_

*these mods will be added later but due to the armor and non-vanilla friendly features they need to be modified for a bit.

[Bliss shader](https://modrinth.com/project/ZvMtQlho) /
[Vanilla Tweaks](https://share.google/yW9EPmEYyg841Z67m)
